children.text:
I bought my 2013 suburban from this dealership in what is simply the worst financial decision of made as an adult.
These guys are [non-permissible content removed].
The few times I've had issues with the car it always requires multiple visits before they finally figure it out, if they figure it out.
They are just as apt to blame something else for their failings.
(eg my bugshield is the reason people can't hear what I say on the phone.
Bug shields removed, problem remains.
My iPhone can't connect with USB, must be my iPhone's issue.
Odd it connects just fine with all my other vehicles and numerous devices as work.
Did I mention it also works with all the rental cars I've used in the last 2 years?)
One other thing.
Remove your valuables.
I've had stuff mysteriously disappear while in service.
I shouldn't have to completely clean out my car to get it serviced.
Don't buy from them; they lie!

DON'T buy your Chevy from Putnam. After wasted hours, they tried to trick us to sign a deal with the rebate fund I should be getting from Chevrolet for first time GM buyer and forfeiting the 60 Days GM Satisfaction program and called it their "discounted price"! What they called is a discounted price is just a lying game they played without integrity. Especially, the Sales Manager Michael Ng, he was just shifting numbers around and said they have provided discount, when clearly the price has not changed from MSRP. They are like the 70's car salesmen, think their customer is stupid. Don't let them fool you, just buy somewhere.
